caption:
Cruffins, one of the newest bakeries in Covent Garden serving delicious pastries, has prepared a surprise gift 🥐✨

How to enter the giveaway⬇️
• Like this post
• Follow @cruffins_london
• Tag someone in the comments who would love to try these too 🤍

Cruffins team will pick 3 winners, each winning a box of 4 cruffins, in two weeks’ time. Good luck! 💫

Originally from Latvia, Cruffins celebrates the simple joy of a perfectly crafted pastry 🥐 The Cruffin combines buttery croissant layers with a soft muffin, finished with creamy fillings, from sweet flavours like Snickers 🍫 and Pistachio to savoury options such as Salmon & Avocado🥑Baked fresh every morning, it’s the perfect spot for a sweet treat 🍰, a delicious brunch, or a cosy coffee catch-up☕️

📍 Cruffins, 181 Drury Lane, WC2B 5QF
